creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to François Charlier from comment #0)
> flask-login 0.5 is broken with recent werkzeug 2.2

2022Q3 (current /quarterly) is also affected but has werkzeug 2.1.2, so it regressed earlier by ports 2dfa973ac532.

>>> import flask_login
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<stdin>", line 1, in <module>
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/flask_login/__init__.py", line 16, in <module>
    from .login_manager import LoginManager
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/flask_login/login_manager.py", line 24, in <module>
    from .utils import (login_url as make_login_url, _create_identifier,
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/flask_login/utils.py", line 13, in <module>
    from werkzeug.security import safe_str_cmp
ImportError: cannot import name 'safe_str_cmp' from 'werkzeug.security' (/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/werkzeug/security.py)
